hero.tagline:
Tennis, as it should
be taught.
hero.subline: Premier tennis in Laguna Beach — from first swings to college pathway. Free trial.

founder.headline: Founded in Laguna Beach by Andrew Mateljan
founder.subhead: A lifetime in the game — from international courts to California's coast.
founder.body: 25 years in tennis as a top-ranked junior and international coach. Years spent coaching in Spain and Croatia shaped a movement-first approach grounded in clarity and accountability. Now guiding players of every level toward their best version of the game.
founder.quote: Structure creates confidence. Confidence creates results.

results.headline: Guided by structure, repetition, and trust.

slides.subline: Karue Sell, ATP #262 — from the #800s to a career high earned through structured work on tour.
slides.imageAlt: Karue Sell hitting a forehand on an outdoor court at LBTA

slides.subline: Ryan Seggerman — career-high ATP singles #72; movement work at LBTA between tour stops.
slides.imageAlt: Ryan Seggerman on a blue hard court

slides.subline: Henry Mateljan — age 9, 4.6 UTR; Little Mo recognition on his junior journey.
slides.imageAlt: Henry Mateljan on court during junior play at LBTA

slides.subline: Olov — 4.0 to 5.0 USTA; strong results in 5.0 play and national-level events.
slides.imageAlt: Olov mid-swing on an outdoor hard court at LBTA

pillars.title: Movement
pillars.detail: Technical precision through biomechanics and footwork fundamentals.
pillars.imageAlt: Intermediate clinic — players in structured drills on a blue court

pillars.title: Craft
pillars.detail: Consistent practice routines create lasting mental toughness.
pillars.imageAlt: High-performance class — focused training on court at LBTA

pillars.title: Community
pillars.detail: Players support each other through wins, losses, and growth.
pillars.imageAlt: Seven LBTA players in a lineup on an outdoor court — community built on respect

programs.headline: Pathways for Every Player
programs.subline: Choose a category, then open the pathway that fits. Everything below links to its own page.

items.title: Junior Programs
items.description: Red, orange, and green ball through college prep.
items.imageAlt: Junior development — young player training on an outdoor court at LBTA

items.title: Adult Programs
items.imageAlt: Adult players in an advanced clinic on an outdoor court

items.title: Private Coaching
items.description: Personal sessions built around your goals.
items.imageAlt: Coach Michelle Mateljan coaching a private lesson on court at LBTA

items.title: Camps
items.description: Seasonal camps and intensive blocks for juniors.
items.imageAlt: Junior players in a camp drill on outdoor courts at Laguna Beach Tennis Academy

items.title: LiveBall
items.description: High-energy group class—movement, patterns, and doubles play in rotating formats.
items.imageAlt: Coach and players during a LiveBall doubles session at LBTA

items.title: UTR Match Play
items.description: Rated Saturday matchplay—season or drop-in, divisions by level, and Grand Finals.
items.imageAlt: Doubles players across the net during outdoor match play at Laguna Beach Tennis Academy

items.title: Leagues & team play
items.description: USTA leagues, team formats, and organized competition in Laguna Beach.
items.imageAlt: League and team tennis on outdoor courts at LBTA

whyChoose.headline: Why Choose Laguna Beach Tennis Academy
whyChoose.subline: Coaching that starts with movement, adds clear structure, and grows beside people who take the work seriously.
whyChoose.image1Alt: Coastal tennis courts at sunset with the Pacific horizon beyond Laguna Beach
whyChoose.image2Alt: Sunlit blue hard courts — clarity of line and surface for focused training

destination.headline: Train where focus meets horizon.
destination.subline: Laguna Beach — where performance meets perspective.
destination.backgroundAlt: Elevated view of blue hard courts at golden hour with the Pacific horizon beyond

community.headline: Players who train our way.
community.subline: Juniors and adults, daytime and under the lights — one standard on every court.
